subject: [PATCH v7 19/20] nfsd: track requested dir attributes

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the NFS daemon (nfsd) to track the union of requested and supported directory attributes in the delegation. This change is necessary because the requested dir attributes can now include word1 attributes, which may result in a two-word bitmap being emitted by nfsd4_encode_bitmap4(). To account for this larger encoding, the dir-attribute bitmap budget in nfsd4_get_dir_delegation_rsize() is bumped from one word to two. This patch lays the groundwork for ensuring that only the necessary directory attributes are encoded when sending add/remove/rename updates.
